scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:contract && npm run test:page
scripts.test:unit: node --import tsx --test lib/__tests__/control-plane-proxy.test.ts lib/__tests__/workspace-context.test.ts lib/__tests__/control-plane-service.test.ts lib/__tests__/handoff-query.test.ts lib/__tests__/billing-providers.test.ts
scripts.preview: opennextjs-cloudflare build && node scripts/patch-opennext-output.mjs && opennextjs-cloudflare preview
scripts.deploy: opennextjs-cloudflare build && node scripts/patch-opennext-output.mjs && opennextjs-cloudflare deploy
scripts.upload: opennextjs-cloudflare build && node scripts/patch-opennext-output.mjs && opennextjs-cloudflare upload
